content:
# GPU-Space IPC & Adaptive Batching — Merged (issue #24, PR #26)

**Merged:** 2026-04-03 into main at d61817c

## What shipped

### cudarc PTX migration (dorea-gpu)
- `CudaGrader` loads lut_apply, hsl_correct, clarity PTX modules once on construction via `cudarc 0.12`
- All device memory is RAII via `CudaSlice<T>` (drop = cudaFree) — no manual alloc/free
- Replaced `extern "C"` static-lib FFI entirely; build.rs now compiles `.cu → .ptx` (not `.cu → .o → .a`)
- cudarc dep: non-optional, `dynamic-linking` feature (dlopen at runtime), `cuda-12040` pinned version (avoids `cuda-version-from-build-system` which breaks CPU-only builds)
- `d_depth` freed after LUT stage (not held for entire function); early drops use stream-ordered `cuMemFreeAsync` on sm_86

### CLI grader reuse (dorea-cli)
- One `CudaGrader` initialized at startup, threaded through `flush_buffer_with_depth` and keyframe loop
- `AdaptiveBatcher::fixed(depth_max_interval)` initialized; `GpuError::Oom` → `report_oom()` → CPU fallback instead of pipeline abort
- `grade_with_grader()` helper handles None grader (CUDA unavailable) by calling CPU path

### PyO3 inference backend (dorea-video, feature = "python")
- `InferenceServer` reimplemented behind `python` Cargo feature using embedded Python
- Subprocess path renamed `inference_subprocess.rs`, remains as default (no breaking change)
- `InferenceServer` caches `Py<PyModule>` for bridge module — no per-call `import_bound`
- `DepthTensorGuard`: `!Send+!Sync` via `PhantomData<*const ()>`, `impl Drop` calls `release()`
- `BorrowedDeviceSlice`: `pub(crate)`, `PhantomData<(&'a (), *mut T)>` (invariant), TODO for GPU tensor sharing spike

### Python bridge (python/dorea_inference/bridge.py)
- `TensorGuard`: holds tensor reference to prevent GC; `release()` zeros all fields
- `load_depth_model`, `load_raune_model`, `run_depth_cpu`, `run_raune_cpu`, `run_depth_gpu`, `run_raune_gpu` entry points
- `vram_free_bytes()`: calls `torch.cuda.empty_cache()` then `mem_get_info()`
- `unload_models()`: clears global model references, called from `InferenceServer::shutdown()`

### VRAM accounting (dorea-gpu/src/device.rs)
- `per_frame_vram_bytes(w, h)`: accounts for 3 RGB planes + depth + 22 MB LUT budget (5 zones × 33³) + 3 proxy L planes
- `verify_cuda_context(device)`: tiny alloc probe for context health check

## Key architectural notes
- `cargo:rustc-cfg=feature="cuda"` sets raw rustc cfg but does NOT activate Cargo optional deps — making cudarc optional would break the dep activation chain
- `#[cfg(feature = "cuda")]` on function parameters is valid Rust; rust-analyzer shows false positives when it can't evaluate build.rs — actual `cargo check` passes clean
- GPU tensor sharing (run_depth_gpu → BorrowedDeviceSlice → grade_frame_cuda) is scaffolded but NOT integrated — requires spike to confirm cudarc/PyTorch context sharing before wiring

## Files changed (21 files, +1764/-406)
- NEW: `crates/dorea-gpu/src/batcher.rs`, `device.rs`
- NEW: `crates/dorea-cli/build.rs`
- NEW: `crates/dorea-video/src/inference/mod.rs`, `inference/pyo3_backend.rs`
- NEW: `python/dorea_inference/bridge.py`
- MODIFIED: `crates/dorea-gpu/src/cuda/mod.rs` (full rewrite), `lib.rs`, `Cargo.toml`, `build.rs`
- MODIFIED: `crates/dorea-cli/src/grade.rs`, `Cargo.toml`
- MODIFIED: `crates/dorea-video/src/lib.rs`, `Cargo.toml`
- RENAMED: `inference.rs` → `inference_subprocess.rs`
- MODIFIED: `python/dorea_inference/depth_anything.py`, `raune_net.py`
